overview.description: Nonprofit digital transformation consultancy helping Czech nonprofit organizations adopt digital tools, automation, and AI
overview.description_long: Digivia (operating as Sdružení VIA, z. ú.) guides nonprofit organizations through digital transformation. Over 15 years, they have helped nearly 10,000 Czech nonprofits work more efficiently by adopting Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, cloud tools, automation, and AI. They offer digital audits, consultations, training workshops, and affordable software (TechSoup). Their mission is to free nonprofits from administrative burden so they can focus on their core social missions. They claim to have saved organizations 1.2 billion CZK in combined efficiency gains.
overview.tagline: Provázíme organizace digitálním světem (We guide organizations through the digital world)

history.origin_story: Operating as Sdružení VIA, z. ú. (IČ: 27013812), Digivia has been digitalizing Czech nonprofit organizations for 15+ years. The Digivia brand represents the digital services arm of Sdružení VIA.

key_milestones.event: Founded as Sdružení VIA, z. ú.
Earliest annual report available on website
Reached 10,000 organizations supported and 1.2 billion CZK in efficiency savings

notable_clients: Sjednocená organizace nevidomých a slabozrakých ČR
Centrum pro rodinu a sociální péči z.s.

metadata.notes: Digivia is the brand name for digital services of Sdružení VIA, z. ú. (IČ: 27013812), a Czech nonprofit. It is not a typical AI startup — it is a nonprofit consultancy that helps other nonprofits adopt digital tools including AI/automation. No CNAIP URL was available. The 'founded_year' is unclear; the organization says 15+ years in 2025 but IČ suggests earlier registration. Annual reports available on site from 2014 onwards.
